description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a light color palette. The front of the house includes a double carport and a recessed entryway, while the rear opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool and a row of palm trees. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor areas. The house appears to be a single story, with an open-plan layout visible through the windows. The exterior is finished in smooth, light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some wooden or metallic accents. The landscaping is simple, with a focus on greenery and open space around the pool.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, double carport, large windows, and a backyard pool surrounded by palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double carport, recessed entryway, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's elongated shape, flat roof, and the pool area extending to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard pool, palm trees, and large sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, pool, and a small detached structure near the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, double carport, and minimal decorative elements
